nodes.label: Stash/Surge MITM+Script Approach
nodes.rationale: Chinese Stash app blocks ads via local VPN tunnel + MITM with user-installed CA + JavaScript response injection. NexusBlock can replicate this.

nodes.label: 5-Layer Argus Architecture
nodes.rationale: Replaces original 7-layer fantasy stack with a buildable 5-layer design: DNS+SNI / MITM API rewriter / Accessibility+Audio / Strategy Router / UX.

nodes.label: Decision: Kotlin-only Proxy
nodes.rationale: LittleProxy/Netty adds 4+ MB and causes Guava conflicts. Kotlin coroutine-based proxy is <500 lines and <500 KB.

nodes.label: Decision: User-Installed CA
nodes.rationale: Android trusts user CAs by default for many apps. YouTube TV does not ship restrictive network_security_config.

nodes.label: Decision: No On-Device Training
nodes.rationale: Training requires 20K labeled frames and GPU hours. Pre-trained generic classifier generalizes across OTT apps.

nodes.label: Decision: Accessibility for SSAI
nodes.rationale: HLS/DASH manifest rewriting requires full CDN MITM which breaks certificate pinning. SSAI manifests are indistinguishable at CDN level.
